# QC-09: Release Readiness Checklist

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Compile and verify the complete release readiness package: confirm all prior stage controls have passed, all approvals are in place, documentation is current, and the release package is complete and matches what was tested. This is the final quality gate before the formal approval process begins.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 5 | Deployment & Release | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent compiles, human approves |
| **Agent does** | Compile release readiness checklist by querying audit trail for all control pass evidences; flag any gaps. |
| **Human does** | Review checklist; approve release package or require resolution of flagged gaps. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Audit trail | GC-01 | Complete audit trail confirming all prior controls were executed and passed. |
| Risk threshold evaluation decision | RC-05 | Stage 4 go/no-go decision confirming readiness for deployment. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Release readiness checklist | evidence | Completed checklist confirming all prior controls passed with references to evidence artefacts. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_release |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Release Manager |

Gaps in prior control evidence block the release. Must be resolved before RC-06 approval can be sought.

## Dependencies

- `RC-05`
- `GC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(5) | Documented deployment and release procedures with verification of prior controls |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Engineering / Release Management · **Owner role:** Release Manager
